underlying_goal: Set up a portable, version-controlled Claude/Codex configuration system with skills, global behavior rules (plan-before-execute), and cross-platform setup scripts
friction_detail: Claude initially explored existing skills unnecessarily (user interrupted), used expensive Task tool for a simple lookup, and needed correction on rsync compatibility and file paths.
brief_summary: User built a portable Claude/Codex config system with skills, global rules, and cross-platform setup scripts through iterative refinement, achieving their goal despite minor friction.
